title: Ability to control Colour By when Baseline is Shown
excerpt:
I would love to be able to maintain the ‘Colour By’ option to show the current status of the tasks in the plan on the Gantt view even when a baseline is shown

posts.author: pem (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to be able to maintain the ‘Colour By’ option to show the current status of the tasks in the plan on the Gantt view even when a baseline is shown

Currently, when I enable a baseline, the baseline dates are shown in dark grey and the current dates are shown in green if they are at or better than the baseline, or red if they are later than the baseline. This isn’t super helpful, certainly not for the way we would want to use the feature.

I would prefer to see the current dates for the tasks coloured by the status (or whatever other thing I chose in the Colour By setting). You could maintain the green/red view by adding a colour by option for ‘better/worse than baseline’ or similar.

Thanks
Max
